content:
yaml v2 handles CRLF (
) correctly in the YAML block content itself (bugs with standalone  were fixed in v2 commits). However, the surrounding frontmatter extraction regex must also handle 
 — if the regex uses literal 
 it will fail on CRLF files because Node.js readFileSync preserves  bytes on all platforms. Single  (old Mac) is treated as non-breaking by yaml v2 (issue #595, closed not-planned). BOM (﻿) at file start will break any ^--- regex. Tabs in YAML indentation throw per spec. Unquoted colon-space in values (description: Use when: X) causes 'mapping values are not allowed here' parse error.
